programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey come into conflict when they remember the events of the shooting of a civilian differently

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: A criminal investigation becomes personal for Hutch when he learns the homicidal maniac among a band of thieving dockworkers is engaged to marry Hutchs childhood friend Nancy

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke goes to deliver a congressional medal of Honor to a brother of one of his friends but theres only children around and no adults

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki discovers that a deadly item from her past has resurfaced a satanic coin that can bring the dead back to life

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Now that Lou has accepted Matts offer to buy into the company the team is back in action but there are still some unanswered questions Sonia Lyndah and Froy interrupt a rich kids brunch party to take away his ride Matt and Lyndah attempt to repo an unusual vehicle from a man who thinks hes Uncle Sam and Lou and Matt are in a losing match with an unruly gang of jacked-up rugby players

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Armed with the belief that he is now co-owner of the business Matt starts making some big business calls - is this the beginning of a new chapter for the team or the beginning of its undoing

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Lambert has the stagecoach wrecked killing the Commissioner so his phony replacement can alter Coonskins land survey When Red Ryder exposes the survey hoax Lambert has his stooge Sheriff put Red in jail

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Deadwood 76
programme.desc: A young drifter is mistaken for Billy the Kid The consequences prove deadly

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E08
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E08

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger influences Wilbur to grow a mustache and Carol insists that he shave it Meanwhile Ed wants Wilbur to install a shower in the barn

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Circumstantial evidence leads Carol to suspect that Wilbur is seeing another woman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A corrupt marshal from outside North Fork goes after an outlaw with a price on his head However he sees an opportunity to make some extra money so he murders an innocent man to pass off as the outlaw so he can collect the bounty and then proceeds to blackmail the real outlaw

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An escaped killer is out to prove that his time in prison hasnt slowed down his speed with a gun

programme.title: Gunsmoke S09E34 Homecoming
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S09E34 Homecoming

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss is riding back from his sweetheart Cameos house when he comes up on a group of men that have just killed a young couple Hoss recognizes one of the men as his friend Jim Applegate Hoss is torn between his friend and the law

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Frank Barker wants Joe to help him get a firearms license for the Fielder Militia The LAPD knows that the militias weapons are stolen from the Army so they have Joe string Barker along until they can arrest him and grab the weapons

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: When Kimble reads of his fathers death he wants to go back home to meet his sister Gerard is expecting this and the DA who convicted Kimble hopes his capture will make him Governor But Kimble has an unexpected ally helping him

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike has serious concerns regarding a dangerous underwater carnival magic act

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Farmer George is attracted to Mary Jo the nubile young woman who helps out with the chores The problem is shes in love with a scarecrow

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Small-time crook Mickey aspires to work as a runner for drug lord Joey Stregga To achieve this aim Mickey sets up his innocent ex-hooker girlfriend Pearl on a date with Stregga but pays heavily for betraying her pure love for him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric feels responsible for an elderly woman who is committed to a mental institution by her daughter after she reports to the police she saw Eric in his werewolf form He takes a job as a custodian at the institution to look after her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A cursed antique harp becomes the motive for murder and the focus of Nicks investigation

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki learns beauty is only skin deep after she falls for a mysterious movie star who relies on an antique makeup case

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A Springwood High student is summoned to the principals office and begins having nightmares leading him to the schools surprising secret Another student dreams about failing his SATs

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Young woman Suzy looks out of the window of her apartment and witnesses a man murdering a woman in the apartment directly across from hers Suzy is so traumatized by what she sees that shes rendered mute Suzy is placed in the care of Dr Trask who alas turns out to be the man who committed the murder she witnessed

programme.title: Real McCoys S01E33
programme.desc: Luke wants to modernize the farm but Grampa is against change

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is moonlighting as a private investigator when cutbacks hit CONTROL

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS can send out sonic booms at will and threatens New York City with one

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ Callie and Samantha stumble upon Steigers pet project a call girl operation run out of a dating service that blackmails its clients with compromising photographs But SCAT isnt the only party interested in getting that briefcase of evidence back from BJ

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger influences Wilbur to grow a mustache and Carol insists that he shave it Meanwhile Ed wants Wilbur to install a shower in the barn

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Circumstantial evidence leads Carol to suspect that Wilbur is seeing another woman

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans operation is known to a Gestapo man who wants to trade his knowledge for 1000000 in diamonds but can he be trusted

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Efforts to aid a Nazi generals assassination plan hit a snag when Schultz unknowingly activates a time bomb meant for the Führer

programme.title: Mchale 325
programme.desc: Mchale 325

programme.title: Mchale 334
programme.desc: Mchale 334

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomers acts of kindness towards his new waitress friend is mistaken for romantic interest by her cruel Marine Sergeant boyfriend

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Grandma Pyle visits Gomer reads his fortune and predicts Gomer will cause something bad to happen; then Sergeant Carter loses his voice while yelling at him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Russian agent who looks and dresses exactly like Gilligan holds Gilligan captive and questions the castaways about their activities However nobody believes Gilligans story and they accuse him of causing all the mischief

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan reels in a crate of vegetable seeds from the lagoon but fails to notice the warning on the crate that the seeds are radioactive

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa has his heart set on joining the towns volunteer fire department

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A friend of Jonathan Harts is killed in a motor accident just after he has left a health farm apparently committing suicide There was no warning of him being troubled so the Harts go undercover to find out what happened at the farm

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Joanna has her doubts but Dick is delighted when Tracy a star struck admirer wants to set up a fan club

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick is sued for 500000 when another author accuses him of plagiarism

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Mad scientist Boris Balinkoff returns to the island with a new invention that turns the castaways into human robots whom he plans to use to commit the ultimate crime

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch investigates the disappearance of two Baywatch lifeguards without a trace in the water going after cries of drowning When Donna also goes missing Mitch investigates an old auto accident with one survivor who may hold a clue to the disappearances

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and his cousin Rob face trouble on the job when a debtor makes shocking claims to police about the newest member of the Pizarro clan Plus will a repossession from a well-connected socialite end with Matt and Froy riding into the sunset or is somebody going to end up locked in a Mexican prison

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: The Disappearance Thriller
programme.desc: Thriller about a contract killer whose wife has disappeared When he is hired by an international organization to carry out a shy or hit he suspects they are connected with her disappearance

programme.title: A Bullet for Pretty Boy
programme.desc: After serving four years of a six-year sentence on a manslaughter charge a tough punk Pretty Boy Floyd escapes from prison and goes on a violent rampage

programme.title: The St Valentines Day Massacre
programme.desc: Follows the chronicles of gang wars held in Chicago in the early twenties between the Southside Mob and the Northside Gang Al Capone forms a team to permanently get rid of his arch rival Moran

programme.title: Hercules 105
programme.desc: Hercules 105

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: An excavation team unleashes a very dangerous Taelon on Earth Siobhan Beckett comes over to America She suspects Lili of being a spy and investigates

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A new more advanced generation of aliens known as the Morthren arrive on Earth Dr Blackwood is saved from a kidnapping by a renegade soldier called John Kincaid After executing the original alien invaders for failing to conquer humanity the Morthren aim to destroy Blackwoods team with a clone of Colonel Ironhorse

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A sickly stranger claiming to be Tressas long-lost brother appears at the Langford house

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim befriends a little girl with volatile behavior

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Ships engineer Patrick Osgood believes he can obtain tiranuim to make a new heart for his sick wife Michelle from the catacombs of the moon using explosives The explosion which follows gives him a vision of the future in which the moon is destroyed by a fireball and a sudden heat storm strikes Though Helena is making a new heart for Michelle its repeated failures cause Osgood to become impatient Convinced he is his wifes only salvation he drags Michelle down into the catacombs giving Koenig a double task - to avoid the fireball and save the Osgoods

programme.title: Exterminators Of The Year 3000
programme.desc: In the year 3000 the Earth has been rendered a desert by nuclear war A group of survivors goes in search of rare and valuable water but standing in their way are the evil Exterminators who live only to cause pain and misery

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke get jobs hauling wrecked cars to demolition derby operator Augie Detweiller unaware he and Boss have schemed to hide stolen engines under the hood When they are suspected of smuggling the stolen engines into Hazzard Bo agrees to become a driver in an upcoming event to find out the truth

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Krull
programme.desc: On the planet of Krull an evil creature called the Beast decimates the worlds army and kidnaps the lovely Princess Lyssa Lysette Anthony who is destined to become queen Her brave beau Prince Colwyn Ken Marshall leads a motley band of warriors including Ergo David Battley and Kegan Liam Neeson to rescue his beloved However before he can face the Beast Colwyn must locate a mystical weapon known as the Glaive which he can use to slay the hideous villain

programme.title: Godzilla Vs The Sea Monster
programme.desc: James Rolfe reviews the 1966 film Ebirah Horror of the Deep dubbed Godzilla vs the Sea Monster by him directed by Jun Fukuda It features a film in which Godzilla was added as a late addition He then battles a giant crab

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Miami Beach on April 26, 2018, Karate Combat: Inception is the first event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held as a private, invite-only spectacle, this video stream will show all of the key fighters, as it happens. Featured on the Main Card: Elhadji "Black Magic" Ndour of the United States versus Andras “The Titan” Virag, a game contender from Hungary. The co-main event features Dionicio Gustavo of the Dominican Republic versus France's Alexandre Bouderbane in a key contest. Other fighters include Adham Sabry of the USA, Spyros Margaritopoulos of Greece, and Joshua Quayhagen from the USA.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Jessica Gladstone v. Lindsay Ball

programme.desc: Nick Agallar v. Nardu Debrah

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Clay Davidson at HK40

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Jesse Arnett

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.
